---
title: "Left Heart Catheterization data"
author: "SUPPORT trial"
date: "2016-01-01"
categories: [Causal I]
---

## Source 

ICU data from SUPPORT trial.  
As modified by TPH

## Dataset

[rhc_class_tph.dta](data/rhc_class_tph.dta)

or use directly in code
```
use https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tphofer/ncsp-hhcr/refs/heads/main/data/rhc_class_tph.dta
```

## Dataset description

### Features

mortality, hospitalized patients, extensive sociodemographic and comorbidity data

### Variables


```
Contains data from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tphofer/ncsp-hhcr/refs/heads/main/data/rhc_class_tph.dta
 Observations:         5,735                  
    Variables:            66                  22 Feb 2025 12:46
                                              (_dta has notes)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Variable      Storage   Display    Value
    name         type    format    label      Variable label
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
id              int     %9.0g                 
ptid            str5    %-9s                  Patient ID
age             double  %10.0g                Age
agecat          byte    %9.0g      agecat     Age (5 categories)
sex             byte    %12.0g     sex        
edu             double  %10.0g                Years of Education
male            byte    %9.0g                 
race            byte    %12.0g     race       Race (3 categories)
income          byte    %12.0g     income     Income (4 categories)
ninsclas        byte    %12.0g     ninsclas   Insurance type (6 category)
sadmdte         int     %10.0g                study admission date
lstctdte        int     %10.0g                date of last contact
dschdte         int     %10.0g                hospital discharge date
dthdte          int     %10.0g                date of death
t3d30           byte    %12.0g                min{dthdte - sadmdte, 30}
dth30           byte    %12.0g     yn         Outcome:Death within 30d
dth60           byte    %9.0g                 Death within 60d
death           byte    %12.0g     yn         death in followup (anytime)
swang1          byte    %12.0g     yn         Treatement:RHC at <= 24 hours
cat1            byte    %12.0g     cat1     * Primary disease category
cat2            byte    %12.0g     cat2       Secondary disease category
resp            byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx resp (up to 4 total)
seps            byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx sepsis (up to 4 total)
card            byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx card (up to 4 total)
meta            byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx metabolic (up to 4 total)
renal           byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx renal (up to 4 total)
gastr           byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx gastr (up to 4 total)
hema            byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx hema (up to 4 total)
neuro           byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx neuro (up to 4 total)
ortho           byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx ortho (up to 4 total)
trauma          byte    %12.0g     yn         Admit dx trauma (up to 4 total)
dnr1            byte    %12.0g     yn         DNR status day 1
das2d3pc        double  %10.0g              * DASI ( Duke Activity Status Index)
adld3pc         float   %9.0g               * ADLs lost @ 2 wks prior
surv2md1        double  %10.0g                2M model survival prediction at day 1
scoma1          byte    %12.0g                SUPPORT Coma Score based on Glasgow D1
transhx         byte    %12.0g                Transfer (> 24 Hours) from Another Hospital
ca              byte    %12.0g     ca         Cancer (3 catgory)
resp1           double  %10.0g                respiration rate Day 1
meanbp1         double  %10.0g                Mean Blood Pressure Day 1
hrt1            int     %12.0g                heart rate Day 1
temp1           double  %10.0g                temperature (celcius) Day 1
wtkilo1         double  %10.0g                weight in kilograms
urin1           double  %10.0g                Urine Output Day 1
pafi1           double  %10.0g                PaO2/(.01*FiO2) Day 1
aps1            int     %12.0g                Apache III score (w.o. Coma) Day 1
wblc1           double  %10.0g                white blood cell count Day 1
hema1           double  %10.0g                hematocrit Day 1
sod1            int     %12.0g                serum sodium Day 1
pot1            double  %10.0g                serum potassium Day 1
crea1           double  %10.0g                serum creatinine Day 1
alb1            double  %10.0g                albumin Day 1
bili1           double  %10.0g                bilirubin Day 1
ph1             double  %10.0g                serum ph (arterial) Day 1
paco21          double  %10.0g                paco2 Day 1
cardiohx        byte    %12.0g                cardio comorbidity
chfhx           byte    %12.0g                chf comorbidity
amihx           byte    %12.0g                ami comorbidity
chrpulhx        byte    %12.0g                chrpul comorbidity
renalhx         byte    %12.0g                renal comorbidity
liverhx         byte    %12.0g                liver comorbidity
gibledhx        byte    %12.0g                gibled comorbidity
dementhx        byte    %12.0g                dement comorbidity
psychhx         byte    %12.0g                psych comorbidity
malighx         byte    %12.0g                malig comorbidity
immunhx         byte    %12.0g                immun comorbidity
                                            * indicated variables have notes
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sorted by: id

```
